# Copilot Instructions - az-tf-modules

## Repository Purpose

Terraform modules for Azure resource deployment.

## Code Patterns

- ✅ Standard Terraform module structure (main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf)
- ✅ Azure provider (azurerm)

## Quality Rules

- ✅ Run `terraform fmt -check -recursive` before committing
- ✅ Run `terraform validate` before committing
- ✅ Use checkmarks in documentation, no AI language or em dashes
